action.reasoning: Observation: iter18 got 0.3515 (best still 0.594 from iter16); task9 train acc~0.04 loss~3.0 (barely above random), val~0.07 during tasks then consol recovers to ~0.35. Dense logs present but show underfitting on later tasks. Analysis: current train.py (even if not fully shown due to truncation in context) has issues in later-task optimization/KD balance/scheduler (lr=5e-4 too low for combined replay+new data under Adam, or KD impl bug preventing fit; mem update balanced but ineffective). Replay+KD+consol+best-val proven at 0.594 with good task balance. Curves confirm no progress on late tasks. Decision: fully rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated train.py+model.py+predict.py with verified successful params (mem=500/task balanced via meta+torch.where/randperm, epochs/task=6, consol=5@1e-4, Adam(5e-4,wd=1e-5), KD beta=0.5 T=2.0 with KLDiv on softmax/T**2, cosine scheduler reset per-task, dense logging every 20 steps+val/best per epoch after full task, deepcopy old_model for KD only on new tasks, final best ckpt). This will recover >0.59 and target >0.61. Run training then submit_eval.
